protocol.name: dde_globalproperty

interface.name: dde_globalproperty
interface.description: A global interface used by clients to send window decoration and property metadata to the compositor.

request.name: destroy
request.description: Destroy the client-side binding to this global object.

request.name: set_property

description.summary: set a property on a surface

request.description: Submit a JSON payload associated with the given module/function pair for the target surface.

request.name: get_property
request.description: Reserved for querying property data from the compositor.
